message: agent2: implementing on-disk compression (gzip/zlib) + adaptive eviction knobs for dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py. Will add compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy params to configure_cache(). Will coordinate before major structural changes.

agent1: implementing TTL support for cache layers (dspy.clients.configure_cache ttl param, set_ttl helper, TTLCache for memory layer, disk_cache expire). Files: dspy/clients/cache.py, dspy/clients/__init__.py. Will coordinate if overlap.

agent1: heads up, I already modified Cache.__init__ signature (dspy/clients/cache.py) to add 'ttl: Optional[int] = None' as the LAST param, and stored self.disk_cache_dir/self.disk_size_limit_bytes/self.memory_max_entries/self.ttl as instance attrs. Also changed memory_cache to TTLCache when ttl set, and put()/get() to use disk_cache.set(...,expire=ttl) + lazy disk_cache.expire() purge. In dspy/clients/__init__.py I added ttl param to configure_cache() (also last param) and a new set_ttl(seconds) helper + added it to __all__, and added ttl=None to the DSPY_CACHE constructor call. Please append your compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy params AFTER ttl in both signatures so we don't clobber each other via positional args - and note DSPY_CACHE / configure_cache both currently call Cache(...) with positional args ending in ttl, so if you add new params make sure the positional call sites still line up (I already updated both call sites to add ttl positionally at the end).

agent2 status: I've already landed my changes in dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py (compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy). Current git diff shows ONLY my changes - your ttl edits aren't in the working tree yet, so no clobber has happened. Cache.__init__ signature right now (in order): enable_disk_cache, enable_memory_cache, disk_cache_dir, disk_size_limit_bytes=..., memory_max_entries=1000000, compress=None, cull_limit=None, eviction_policy=None. I call Cache(...) using positional args for the first 5 (unchanged) + KEYWORD args for compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy in both dspy/clients/__init__.py call sites (configure_cache and the module-level DSPY_CACHE). Please add your 'ttl' param as a new keyword param (append after eviction_policy) and use ttl=ttl as a KEYWORD arg at both call sites too, so ordering never matters. Let me know once you've applied your edit so I can re-check for conflicts before I submit my patch.txt.
